This is why we carefully study the individual characteristics of every single case before treatment and for many years afterwards through regular follow-up. All of our treatment plans have benefited from this exhaustive clinical analysis. Our team, comprising of surgeons and dentists of international repute, adheres to the Minimal Invasiveness Protocol, draws on its extensive clinical experience to advise patients on what would be the most appropriate treatment plan for them while keeping in mind their individual needs. At BDC, you get a 360° availability of services in the field of dentistry. Our Services Implant Dentistry Cosmetic Dentistry Kids Dentistry “It is my life’s mission, both personally and professionally, to make available the most advanced and holistic oral care to all strata of humankind, so as to make one and all smile their best.” Dr. Rajeev Gupta Dr. Rajeev Gupta Dr. Sonia Gupta Dr. Rajeev Gupta, B.D.S., M.D.S. Dr. Rajeev Gupta is an avid clinician. He is a perfectionist, a disciplinarian, and an eminent professional. After completing his Bachelors of Dental Surgery program in the year 1996, from Buddha Institute of Dental Sciences and Hospital, he began his journey to achieve his life’s mission: To deliver the best possible oral salubrity and aesthetics possible. A firm believer in providing quality dental treatment, he started Balaji Dental Centre in 1996 to bring together all dental facilities under one roof. Read More Dr. Sonia Gupta, B.D.S., M.D.S. Dr. Sonia Gupta is a generous person with maternal instincts and an ever ebullient demeanour. She is passionate about nurturing and carefully preserving the oral health of her patients, and she has done exactly that in her 22-year-old illustrious career. She graduated from JG Dental College and Hospital followed by a Masters in Public Health Dentistry. Read More State-of-the-Art Dental Centre Our Journey Balaji Dental Centre (BDC) is a premier dental facility located in Paschim Vihar, a prime locality of New Delhi, and was established in the year 1996 by Dr. Rajeev Gupta with the sole intent of providing a modern, ideal, and comfortable dental care to its patients. In nearly 24 years of dedicated service, Balaji dental centre has thrived and witnessed exponential growth while making a mark for itself both nationally and internationally. From a humble beginning, Balaji Dental Centre has come a long way and today, it comprises a large group of dentists, specialists, technicians, and hygienists. One of the QCI Accredited dental facilities in India, BDC has added to its portfolio a host of services including Milestones BDC has been awarded ISO 9001:2008 Certification to acknowledge our strict adherence to international standards of hygiene, sterilisation, and attention to detail in addition to our focus on international-level protocols of patient safety and satisfaction. Over the years, as BDC has grown, we have brought on board various specialists, technicians, and support staff to build a professional team. They come from prominent institutions, both in India and abroad, and have the ability, proficiency, and experience to be well-known and respected in their specific fields. Cosmetic Dentistry Dr. Rajeev Gupta has spent 25 years researching and perfecting the best techniques for veneers, implants, crowns, and every aspect of cosmetic dentistry. He and his team of top specialists provide unparalleled skill and experience, patient-centric care, and beautiful results. Anti-Aging Dentistry Anti-Aging Dentistry is an innovative approach that can years off of a patient’s face. By treating stained, crooked, or worn-down teeth and a narrow smile with anti-aging techniques, truly transformational results can be achieved. Smile Makeover Most patients don’t realize that their dental reconstruction doesn’t have to take very long. BDC has the capability and technology to achieve incredible reconstruction work with 1-Week Smile Makeover. Dental Implants Whether you need replacement for a single tooth, multiple teeth, or a complete set of teeth, we offer the most advanced dental implants to effectively replace missing teeth and restore your smile, functionality, and self-confidence. Dental Veneers Dr. Rajeev Gupta has developed Infinity Veneers, a groundbreaking innovation that tackles the problems that traditional veneers have such as staining and transparency. Through many experiments, he designed superior veneers that avoid these issues. Overview Anti-Aging Dentistry Smile Makeover Dental Implants Dental Veneers The Art of Smile Transformation Dr Rajeev at BDC has completed thousands of successful smile transformations, turning imperfect and flawed smiles into beautiful, radiant, natural smiles. He focuses his practice on smile transformations, both dramatic full-mouth restorations and small transformations that can still make a world of difference. When he sees a new patient, he can learn about smile, its flaws, and how to perfect it - without even examining teeth. That's why we go out of our way to create a warm, welcoming environment that puts our patients at ease. From our comfortable waiting area to our gentle and compassionate staff, we strive to make your experience as pleasant and stress-free as possible.
